title: Master Side-Effect Management (Actions & Invocations)
description: Master the decoupling of "Fire-and-Forget" actions from managed "Invocations" (e.g., Promises, Callbacks) within state machines. Implement strategies for isolating and testing side-effects to maintain the purity of state logic.
objectives: Master the decoupling of "Fire-and-Forget" actions from managed "Invocations" (e.g., Promises, Callbacks) within state machines.
Implement strategies for isolating and testing side-effects to maintain the purity of state logic.
